summary: Frontend-only testing of Firebase Email/Password auth replacing the mock. All 7 required flows pass: customer register shows Arabic verify notice and blocks navigation; unverified login shows EXACT Arabic message 'يرجى تأكيد البريد الإلكتروني أولاً' with resend button; wrong-password login shows mapped Arabic invalid-credential message and correctly hides resend button; company register (via /auth/company-register) shows auth-verify-notice + auth-resend-btn; workshop-dashboard, company-dashboard, /admin/wallet-requests and /workshop-dashboard/ads all render without Firebase-auth gating and without runtime errors.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.tsx: register() force-signs-out after sendEmailVerification — matches playbook and the PRD requirement. Good.
firebase.ts: apiKey, appId etc. hardcoded in source. Acceptable for Firebase web config (public keys) but consider moving to EXPO_PUBLIC_* env vars for easier multi-env deploy.

Login path correctly throws the EXACT Arabic string 'يرجى تأكيد البريد الإلكتروني أولاً' and login.tsx renders login-resend-btn conditionally on topError === that exact string — tight coupling, but works.

register.tsx (customer) does NOT render a visible resend button (no testID 'register-resend-btn' in the customer flow). The task description listed 'login-resend-btn' (customer) + 'auth-resend-btn' (company/workshop) only, so this is per-spec; resend after customer registration would require re-login attempt first.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 unverified Firebase users for testing: testuser+irzr01iq@example.com and testco+8dv2lo1j@example.com (throwaway, unverified). Safe to leave or prune from Firebase console.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Firebase project sinkmarket-73267. Emails can be anything valid-syntax — Firebase will accept them; verification link is never clicked in test. Reusing an existing email will return auth/email-already-in-use (mapped to 'هذا البريد الإلكتروني مستخدم مسبقاً'). Use a fresh random email per register test. testIDs: register-verify-notice, login-resend-btn, auth-verify-notice, auth-resend-btn.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no failures. All spec requirements satisfied end-to-end on preview URL.
